headline_claims: To address these challenges, this paper proposes PE-PINN (Physics-Enhanced PINN), a novel framework for the PKN model that explicitly embeds physical prior knowledge into the network architecture.
The remainder of this paper is organized as follows.
closure_targets: ## Conclusion sec:conclusion This paper presented PE-PINN, a Physics-Enhanced PINN framework for the PKN model of hydraulic fracture propagation.

introduction: To address these challenges, this paper proposes PE-PINN (Physics-Enhanced PINN), a novel framework for the PKN model that explicitly embeds physical prior knowledge into the network architecture.
The remainder of this paper is organized as follows.
method: To address these challenges, this paper proposes a physics-enhanced representation that embeds prior physical knowledge directly into the network architecture.
conclusion: ## Conclusion sec:conclusion This paper presented PE-PINN, a Physics-Enhanced PINN framework for the PKN model of hydraulic fracture propagation.
